Box #2—Do the Opposite
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #2—Box#2 Do the Opposite
*How might you flip the whole or a part—or reverse it somehow?
Doing the opposite is always a good strategy to consider—if only because it’s so
counterintuitive. If people do something one way, what if you did it the opposite way?
If everyone else charges extra for something, what if you don’t? This also works for
business relationships. Someone under you isn’t performing, no matter how closely
you watch over them? Try the opposite and leave them alone for a while? Trying the
opposite can often work for personal relationships well. And, of course, for copy—because
saying the opposite of what everyone else is saying or doing is a great way to grab attention.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
